title: Gynoveda — Marketing Journey Migration
subtitle: Migrating and rebuilding multi-channel lifecycle journeys with zero disruption and full compliance
role: Lifecycle Marketing Engineering, Journey Migration, QA & Automation

isBrandedMetric.title: Total Events Processed
isBrandedMetric.description: Club Mahindra set out to scale its Customer Lifecycle Marketing

overview: Gynoveda, an Ayurvedic women's health brand, was running 45 active lifecycle marketing journeys on Growlytics. As the business scaled, they moved to MoEngage for better automation and cross-channel capabilities. Attributics led the full migration — auditing journeys, rebuilding them in MoEngage, managing WhatsApp approvals via Gupshup, and running QA before go-live.

challenge.subtitle: Platform Rebuild
challenge.description: All 45 journeys had to be fully recreated in MoEngage, preserving original logic, timing, and channel sequences without disrupting live customers.

challenge.subtitle: WhatsApp Approvals
challenge.description: WhatsApp templates couldn't be copied — each had to be built fresh and submitted via Gupshup for Meta verification before use.

challenge.subtitle: Multi-Channel Complexity
challenge.description: Journeys spanned WhatsApp, Email, and SMS within a single workflow, each with different formats, triggers, and delay structures.

challenge.subtitle: DND Compliance
challenge.description: Messages triggered between 9 PM and 9 AM had to be queued — not dropped — and delivered at 9 AM the next morning.

challenge.subtitle: Content Errors
challenge.description: QA uncovered broken links, wrong UTMs, outdated TypeForm URLs (migrated to Riddle), and incorrect page paths across multiple journeys.

solution.subtitle: Retention
solution.description: PCOS, Jeehv, TULA, SOMHA, Haridrakhand (Hindi), Medohar, Iron Folic Acid, Calcium-VitaminD3, Menopause

solution.subtitle: Win-back
solution.description: PCOS win-back at 30–45, 46–60, 61–75, and 76–90 day intervals (English + Hindi)

solution.subtitle: Transactional
solution.description: Order Confirmation SMS, Order Placed WhatsApp, Clinic Post-Consultation Drip, Doctor Adherence Call

solution.subtitle: NPS & Surveys
solution.description: Product-specific NPS nudges and Repeat Purchase Survey across 8 SKUs

solution.subtitle: Acquisition
solution.description: Abandon Cart, COS Communication, Jeehv JoinCOS, Cross-sell PCOS–Medohar

process.title: Audit & Prioritise
process.description: Reviewed all 45 journeys in Growlytics. Mapped triggers, channels, delays, and entry conditions. Flagged broken links and outdated assets. Identified 37 high-priority journeys for immediate migration.

process.title: Template Setup
process.description: Email and SMS copied directly from Growlytics. WhatsApp templates built from scratch, submitted via Gupshup, and approval status tracked per campaign before any WhatsApp node was activated.

process.title: Journey Rebuild
process.description: All journeys rebuilt in MoEngage with entry conditions, event/segment triggers, time delays, DND queuing, channel nodes, and corrected URLs — incorporating client-requested changes throughout.

process.title: QA & Go-Live
process.description: Dual-layer QA: Attributics validated flow structure, templates, and segmentation; Gynoveda reviewed and approved. Each journey signed off before activation.

results.metric: All 45 journeys rebuilt and validated in MoEngage; 37 high-priority journeys live first.
WhatsApp, Email, and SMS journeys operational across the full lifecycle — onboarding through win-back.
DND queuing ensures compliant delivery; no messages dropped during restricted hours.
Broken links, wrong UTMs, and outdated form URLs corrected during migration.
All journeys across products, segments, and channels managed from a single MoEngage workspace.

conclusion: The Gynoveda migration project successfully transitioned 45 complex lifecycle journeys from Growlytics to MoEngage without disrupting live user flows. By combining structured auditing, precise journey rebuilding, and rigorous QA, the system retained original campaign intent while improving data accuracy and compliance.

The introduction of DND-aware queuing, corrected content assets, and centralized journey management created a more reliable and scalable lifecycle marketing setup. With all channels unified under MoEngage, Gynoveda is now equipped to run consistent, compliant, and high-quality engagement campaigns across the entire customer lifecycle.
